pageContext.name: Black Panther Miniature
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present this minified version of the fan-favorite Black Panther, casting the heroic king in fine pewter, but preserving the meticulous details of his vibranium powered suit. Posed in a sturdy stance, the King of Wakanda is ever ready for battle.  Royal Selangor has painstakingly reproduced Black Panther in fine detail, despite its miniature size. Being almost 2 inches tall, this miniature gives collectors a chance to own their very own fun-sized T'challa.  The Black Panther Miniature Pewter Collectible comes boxed in a black box, emblazoned with the Marvel logo and featuring a large window for collectors that just want to keep it in mint condition.
